requirements.note: Heian-era. Yorozu vessel preferred. Creates any recognized substance.

abilities.name: Insect Wings
abilities.description: Two pairs of insect wings. Sustained flight.

mechanics.special_effect: Always active. Aerial mobility at no extra activation cost.

abilities.name: Liquid Metal
abilities.description: Semi-autonomous liquid metal shapeable into any form.

mechanics.special_effect: Shapes into blades, shields, projectiles. CE manipulates it independently.
Massive boost to strength, speed, durability for close combat.

abilities.name: True Sphere
abilities.description: Perfect sphere that generates infinite pressure.

mechanics.special_effect: No contact area. Crushes via infinite pressure. Sure-hit inside domain.

domain_expansion.name: Threefold Affliction (Shikkushikku Shikku)
domain_expansion.description: Blank space with oversized insect brain structures. Instant destruction of anything caught.

mechanics.special_effect: Willed destruction of anything inside. Organic horror aesthetic.
